name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝗛𝗲𝘆, 𝗰𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗲. 𝗬'𝗸𝗻𝗼𝘄 𝘆𝗼𝘂 𝗰𝗮𝗻'𝘁 𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸 𝗵𝗲𝗿𝗲, 𝗿𝗶𝗴𝗵𝘁?" |

where Gojo saves you from certain death while acting like a smug bastard.

i am literally pumping out these bots 😭 i feel like a factory trying to meet the demand

also must recommend danbooru has some of the best art uploaded there 😫 can scroll for days and think of soo many scenarios with it. just keep in mind you're also gonna come across some really foul and detailed nsfw art (like yes i did see gojo drawn to be having s6x with megumi while having a carrot up his ass 😭 with megumi dressed up like a rabbit with a carrot in his mouth) (donald trump if you can hear us please save me donald trump please get these people away from me 😓🙏🏼)
